name: The Braxtons
overview: The fierce Braxton women reunite for the first time since the loss of their beloved sister, Traci, offering viewers a raw and unfiltered look at the family’s highs and lows. Toni, Towanda, Trina, Tamar and Ms. E navigate careers, health challenges and busy personal lives while growing their family bond.

trailers.title: The Braxtons Trailer: Watch the Sisters Navigate Death, Health Issues and Family Drama
